kvendra-cloud.description: Kvendra hosted KB engine. 14 MCP tools (entity_*, txn_*, whoami, config_get, help). Auth: OAuth 2.1 + PKCE against auth.kvendra.cloud (Cognito Hosted UI). Pro tier required — promote a Free user to Pro with the AWS CLI snippet in docs/SETUP-PRO.md. Server name is `kvendra-cloud` (not `kvendra`) to avoid colliding with the local `kvendra` CLI MCP server — Claude Code resolves same-name servers by scope precedence and Local > Plugin, so a same-name plugin server gets eclipsed silently.
